name: autograph
description: Schema-as-code memory engine for Obsidian vaults that AI agents write to: typed cards, entity dedup, link repair, update-in-place (supersede + History), Ebbinghaus decay, MOC generation, and a vault health score. Plain Markdown you own, Python stdlib only. Ships the autograph skill plus a /research slash command that bootstraps a schema for empty or chaotic vaults.
